name: @chbrain/khai-engine-narrative
description: khai engine content, the narrative domain: narrative identity as position -- the life story a persona carries, shaped by redemptive or contaminated sequence and by agentic or communal thematic orientation.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Narrative identity as position: the life story a persona carries -- redemptive or contaminated in sequence, agentic or communal in thematic orientation.

card.wire: Attaches at Position. The anchor (position_narrative.md) declares narrative identity: the interpreted life story the persona carries, through which every new event is received.
card.issue: Four expressions a persona may hold: redemptive (suffering as the hinge of growth -- the arc moves from bad to good), contaminated (promise gives way to loss -- good things turn bad), agentic (the story is organised around mastery and achievement), communal (the story is organised around belonging, care, and love). Sequence and theme are orthogonal; the engine models the dominant coloring, not the full 2×2.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. The link: each persona links, under Projection, the narrative expression it carries.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and each persona links a real narrative expression. Whether the expression is true to the persona's history and the play's arc is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. Then give each persona its narrative shape under Projection. Read it in how the persona receives events -- not in what they announce about themselves.
